name_en: Premium original leather M25256 White mini This Capucines BB bag features matte Taurillon leather with metal hardware, showcasing a sharp style. The flap offers either external or inward-facing styles, and the tidy interior features multiple pockets. Adjust the shoulder strap for a crossbody option. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
